**अिधसूचना** नई �द�ली, 27 माच�, 2015 **का.आ. 870(अ).—** बीमा अिधिनयम, 1938 (1938 का 4) क� धारा 2ग के �ारा �द� शि�य� का �योग करते �ए के� ीय सरकार, यह िनदेश देती है �क- (क) उ� अिधिनयम क� धारा 29, 32ख, 32ग, 32घ, 64ग, 64घ, 64ड., 64च, 64छ, 64ज, 64झ, 64ञ, 64ट, 64ठ, 64ड, 64ढ़, 64ण, 64द, धारा 64 यूएलए क� उप-धारा (2), धारा 101क, 101ख, 105ख, 110च, 118 और धारा 120 म' अंत)व+ उपबंध धारा 2(ग) क� उप-धारा (1) के खंड (ग) म' यथा उि�लिखत भारतीय बीमा कंपनी, बीमा सहकारी सोसायटी या एक कारपोरेट िनकाय होने के कारण इन बीमाकता�2 पर लागू नह3 ह�गे। (ख) धारा 2ग क� उप-धारा (1) के खंड (ग) म' उि�लिखत भारतीय बीमा कंपनी, बीमा सहकारी सोसायटी या कारपोरेट िनकाय होने के कारण खंड (क) म' उि�लिखत धारा से fHkUu सभी धाराएं बीमाकता� पर लागू ह�गी। िवशेष आ)थक जोन अिधिनयम, 2005 (2005 का 28) क� धारा 2 के खंड (य क) म' यथा प9रभािषत �कसी िवशेष आ)थक जोन म' बीमा कारबार करना। [फा. सं. 14017/98/2014-बीमा- II ] अनूप वधावन, संयु� सिचव 1423 GI/2015 (1) 2 [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY ### **MINISTRY OF FINANCE** ### **(Department of Financial Services)** ### **NOTIFICATION** New Delhi, the 27th March, 2015 **S.O. 870(E).** — In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 2CA of the Insurance Act, 1938 (4 of 1938), the Central Government hereby directs that- (a) the provisions contained in Sections 29, 32B, 32C, 32D, 64C, 64D, 64E, 64F, 64G, 64H, 64J, 64K, 64L, 64M, 64N, 64-O, 64R, sub-section (2) of Section 64 ULA, Sections 101A, 101B, 105B, 110F, 118 and Section 120 of the said Act shall not apply to an insurer, being an Indian Insurance Company, insurance co-operative society or a body corporate referred to in clause (c) of sub-section (1) of Section 2C; (b) all sections other than those mentioned in clause (a) shall apply to an insurer, being an Indian Insurance Company, insurance co-operative society or a body corporate referred to in clause (c) of sub-section (1) of Section 2C, carrying on the business of insurance in any Special Economic Zone as defined in clause (za) of Section 2 of the Special Economic Zones Act, 2005 (28 of 2005). [F. No. 14017/98/2014-Ins. II] ANUP WADHAWAN, Jt. Secy. (ख) धारा 2ग क� उप-धारा (1) के खंड (ग) म' उि�लिखत भारतीय बीमा कंपनी, बीमा सहकारी सोसायटी या कारपोरेट िनकाय होने के कारण खंड (क) म' उि�लिखत धारा से fHkUu सभी धाराएं बीमाकता� पर लागू ह�गी।

chunks.heading: **NOTIFICATION**
chunks.attachment: विशेष आर्थिक जोन में बीमा कारोबार  _ Insurance Business in Special Economic Zone.pdf
chunks.content:
New Delhi, the  27th  March, 2015 

**S.O. 870(E).** — In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 2CA of the Insurance Act, 1938 (4 of 1938), the Central Government hereby directs that- 

(a) the provisions contained in Sections 29, 32B, 32C, 32D, 64C, 64D, 64E, 64F, 64G, 64H, 64J, 64K, 64L, 64M, 64N, 64-O, 64R, sub-section (2) of Section 64 ULA, Sections 101A, 101B, 105B, 110F, 118 and Section 120 of the said Act shall not apply to an insurer, being an Indian Insurance Company, insurance co-operative society or a body corporate referred to in clause (c) of sub-section (1) of Section 2C; 

(b) all sections other than those mentioned in clause (a) shall apply to an insurer, being an Indian Insurance Company, insurance co-operative society or a body corporate referred to in clause (c) of sub-section (1) of Section 2C, carrying on the business of insurance in any Special Economic Zone as defined in clause (za) of Section 2 of the Special Economic Zones Act, 2005 (28 of 2005). 

[F. No. 14017/98/2014-Ins. II] ANUP WADHAWAN, Jt. Secy. 

Printed by the Manager, Government of  India Press, Ring  Road,  Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054.

chunks.heading: **NOTIFICATION**
chunks.content:
New Delhi, the  27th  March, 2015 

**S.O. 870(E).** — In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 2CA of the Insurance Act, 1938 (4 of 1938), the Central Government hereby directs that- 

(a) the provisions contained in Sections 29, 32B, 32C, 32D, 64C, 64D, 64E, 64F, 64G, 64H, 64J, 64K, 64L, 64M, 64N, 64-O, 64R, sub-section (2) of Section 64 ULA, Sections 101A, 101B, 105B, 110F, 118 and Section 120 of the said Act shall not apply to an insurer, being an Indian Insurance Company, insurance co-operative society or a body corporate referred to in clause (c) of sub-section (1) of Section 2C; 

(b) all sections other than those mentioned in clause (a) shall apply to an insurer, being an Indian Insurance Company, insurance co-operative society or a body corporate referred to in clause (c) of sub-section (1) of Section 2C, carrying on the business of insurance in any Special Economic Zone as defined in clause (za) of Section 2 of the Special Economic Zones Act, 2005 (28 of 2005). 

[F. No. 14017/98/2014-Ins. II] ANUP WADHAWAN, Jt. Secy. 

Printed by the Manager, Government of  India Press, Ring  Road,  Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054.
